requirements.title: Frame type
requirements.text: The system shall define a CAN frame type carrying ID, flags (Ext, RTR, FD, BRS, ESI, XL), and data payload.

requirements.title: Filter type
requirements.text: The system shall define a Filter type for masked ID comparison.

requirements.title: Bus interface
requirements.text: The system shall expose a Bus trait with Send, Subscribe, and Close methods.

requirements.title: Frame validation
requirements.text: The system shall validate CAN frames per RELAY spec §15.1 constraints.

requirements.title: Error sentinels
requirements.text: The system shall expose Closed, NotConnected, Timeout, and PayloadTooLarge error variants.

requirements.title: Concurrent safety
requirements.text: The Bus trait implementation shall be safe to call from multiple async tasks concurrently.

requirements.title: RELAY adapter
requirements.text: The system shall expose adapt(), to_message(), and from_message() for RELAY protocol interoperability.

requirements.title: Lifecycle
requirements.text: Close shall be idempotent; send/subscribe after close shall return Closed error.

requirements.title: Standard ID range
requirements.text: ValidateFrame shall reject standard IDs exceeding 0x7FF.

requirements.title: Extended ID range
requirements.text: ValidateFrame shall reject extended IDs exceeding 0x1FFFFFFF.

requirements.title: BRS/FD constraint
requirements.text: ValidateFrame shall reject frames with BRS=true and FD=false.

requirements.title: RTR/FD constraint
requirements.text: ValidateFrame shall reject frames with RTR=true and FD=true.

requirements.title: Data length constraint
requirements.text: ValidateFrame shall reject data payloads exceeding the frame format maximum (8/64/2048).

requirements.title: XL/FD mutual exclusion
requirements.text: ValidateFrame shall reject frames with both XL=true and FD=true.

requirements.title: Virtual bus creation
requirements.text: The system shall provide a VirtualBus that requires no OS dependencies.

requirements.title: Frame broadcast
requirements.text: Frames sent on the virtual bus shall be broadcast to all matching subscribers.

requirements.title: Multiple subscribers
requirements.text: The virtual bus shall support multiple concurrent subscribers with independent channels.

requirements.title: Filter semantics
requirements.text: The virtual bus shall deliver frames only to subscribers whose filters match.

requirements.title: Back-pressure
requirements.text: The virtual bus shall apply DropNewest, DropOldest, or Block back-pressure policy per subscriber.

requirements.title: Single frame
requirements.text: ISO-TP shall transmit payloads ≤7 bytes in a single CAN frame.

requirements.title: Multi-frame send
requirements.text: ISO-TP shall segment payloads >7 bytes into first frame + consecutive frames.

requirements.title: Flow control
requirements.text: ISO-TP sender shall process flow control frames for block-size and ST_min pacing.

requirements.title: Multi-frame receive
requirements.text: ISO-TP shall reassemble consecutive frames into a single payload.

requirements.title: Timeout
requirements.text: ISO-TP shall respect context timeouts and return ErrTimeout on expiry.

requirements.title: 29-bit ID decode
requirements.text: J1939 shall decode priority, PGN, source, and destination from a 29-bit extended CAN ID.

requirements.title: PGN peer-to-peer
requirements.text: J1939 shall treat PDU Format <240 as peer-to-peer with PS as destination.

requirements.title: PGN broadcast
requirements.text: J1939 shall treat PDU Format ≥240 as broadcast with PS as group extension.

requirements.title: ID encode
requirements.text: J1939 shall encode priority, PGN, source, and destination back to a 29-bit ID.

requirements.title: J1939 send/receive
requirements.text: J1939Bus shall send and receive J1939 frames over an underlying CAN Bus.

requirements.title: PGN filter
requirements.text: J1939Bus.subscribe shall filter by PGN.

requirements.title: E2E header
requirements.text: Safety.Protector shall prepend a 10-byte E2E header to every payload.

requirements.title: CRC-16 protection
requirements.text: The E2E header shall include a CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE over the header fields and payload.

requirements.title: Sequence counter
requirements.text: The E2E header shall include a monotonically increasing sequence counter.

requirements.title: CRC validation
requirements.text: Receiver shall return E2EError::CrcMismatch when the CRC does not match.

requirements.title: Sequence gap detection
requirements.text: Receiver shall return E2EError::SequenceGap when sequence numbers are non-consecutive.

requirements.title: Header too short
requirements.text: Receiver shall return E2EError::HeaderTooShort when data is shorter than 10 bytes.

requirements.title: DBC parse
requirements.text: The DBC parser shall parse BO_ message blocks and SG_ signal definitions.

requirements.title: Signal decode
requirements.text: The DBC parser shall decode signal values from CAN frame data using start bit, length, byte order, factor, and offset.
